chunks.heading: Chapter 1 — Introduction
chunks.text: Chapter 1 Introduction covers: 11 Background (111 Purpose, 112 Scope, 113 Additional Benefits); 12 Overview (121 List Maintenance, 122 List Correction, 123 Updates, 124 Address Output, 125 Deliverability); 13 Address Information Systems Products and Services.

chunks.heading: Chapter 2 — Postal Addressing Standards
chunks.text: Chapter 2 Postal Addressing Standards covers: 21 General (211 Standardized Delivery Address Line and Last Line, 212 Format, 213 Secondary Address Unit Designators, 214 Attention Line, 215 Dual Addresses); 22 Last Line of the Address; 23 Delivery Address Line; 24 Rural Route Addresses; 25 Highway Contract Route Addresses; 26 General Delivery Addresses; 27 United States Postal Service Addresses; 28 Post Office Box Addresses; 29 Puerto Rico Addresses.

chunks.heading: Chapter 3 and Appendices
chunks.text: Chapter 3 Business Addressing Standards covers sections 31 through 35, including compression guidelines. Appendices A through J include international addresses, street suffix abbreviations, state abbreviations, and regional formats.
